case_title: KATHLEEN CAMPBELL VS. SPECIALTY TOWING & RECOVERY, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER DEFENDANT REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-10-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN CAMPBELL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM WITH WITNESS JIN HONG CHOI. DEFENDANT SPECIALTY TOWING & RECOVERY INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ABIGAIL FUENTES DBA AUTO TOWING IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. SPECIALTY TOWING AND RECOVERY INC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY ZOOM AT THE NEXT HEARING WITHOUT SUBMITTING A REQUEST. EXHIBITS SHOULD BE SENT TO THE COURT AND OTHER PARTY 5 DAY BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR KOREAN INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, KATHLEEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NOT GIVEN) SERVED JUL-14-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ABIGAIL FUENTES DBA AUTO TOWING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG - HEARING PREVIOUSLY HELD ON DECEMBER 10, 2021, AND WAS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 9, 2022 FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF PROVIDES WITNESS, JIN HONG CHOI WHO WAS THE DRIVER OF THE VEHICLE INVOLVED IN THE ACCIDENT AND TOWED BY DEFENDANT. MR. CHOI PROVIDES TESTIMONY, THROUGH THE ASSISTANCE OF COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER TED KIM ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN CAMPBELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ABIGAIL FUENTES, DBA AUTO TOW IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT SPECIALTY TOWING & RECOVERY, INC., PREVIOUSLY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE ON AUGUST 13, 2021 IS NOT. COURT STATES THAT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO REINSTATE SPECIALTY TOWING & RECOVERY HAS BEEN RECEIVED. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ABIGAIL FUENTES DBA AUTO TOWING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED JUN-21-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPECIALTY TOWING & RECOVERY, INC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, KATHLEEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABIGAIL FUENTES DBA AUTO TOWING $1,110.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,235.00, (SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE AND KOREAN INTERPRETER TO FEB-09-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN CAMPBELL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM WITH WITNESS JIN HONG CHOI. DEFENDANT SPECIALTY TOWING & RECOVERY, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSE BADILLO (DRIVER). DEFENDANT AUTO TOWING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSE OSCAR MONROY (MANAGER). DEFENDANT ABIGAIL FUENTES IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. ALL PARTIES CAN MAKE A ZOOM APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING. KOREAN INTERPRETOR REQUESTED AT NEXT APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSE V. BADILLO, DRIVER FILED BY DEFENDANT SPECIALTY TOWING & RECOVERY, INC
